headline: Digital Banks Serve 4.5 Million Customers After 18 Months
context: Malaysia 5 licensed digital banks serve 4.5 million customers with RM8.2 billion in deposits after 18 months.

cards.big: 5 digital banks serve 4.5 million with RM8.2 billion deposits
cards.sub: New entrants offer 3-4% rates disrupting traditional deposit market

cards.big: GXBank leads with 1.8 million customers followed by AEON at 1.2 million
cards.sub: Attracted customers with rates double traditional bank offerings

cards.big: Traditional banks lost estimated RM4.5 billion deposits to digital rivals
cards.sub: Big 8 responded by launching own features and matching rates

cards.big: Digital bank lending reached only RM1.2 billion indicating cautious approach
cards.sub: Bank Negara framework limits rapid scaling of lending portfolios

cards.big: Digital banking tests whether new entrants can serve the underbanked or just compete for deposits
4.5 million digital bank customers in 18 months. Speed of adoption tests whether regulatory frameworks can keep pace.
